sentences.english: I wake up at five every morning, even on weekends.
The early morning is my most productive time.
I set five alarms and still have trouble getting up.
sentences.korean: 알람을 다섯 개 맞추고도 일어나기 힘들어요.

sentences.english: I hit the snooze button at least three times.
sentences.korean: 스누즈 버튼을 적어도 세 번 눌러요.

sentences.english: I started putting my phone across the room so I have to physically get up to turn off the alarm, and it actually works.
sentences.korean: 폰을 방 반대편에 두기 시작했어요. 물리적으로 일어나서 알람을 꺼야 하거든요. 정말 효과가 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
